result:
**Goal: Add a Lissajous Curve / Harmonograph simulation mode.**

This would render the mesmerizing mathematical curves produced by coupled pendulum oscillators — tracing intricate, decaying patterns in real-time ASCII art. Users could adjust frequency ratios, phase offsets, damping, and amplitude to explore the full family of Lissajous figures and harmonograph spirals. It fills a gap between the existing fractal/chaos modes and the physics modes, and produces some of the most visually striking patterns possible in a terminal.
